verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Thank You for the cross, Lord. Thank You for the price You paid. Bearing all my sin and shame, In love You came And gave amazing grace.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Thank You for Your love, Lord. Thank You for the nail-pierced hands. Wash me in Your cleansing flow, Now all I know Is Your forgiveness and embrace.

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: Worthy is the Lamb Seated on the throne. We crown You now With many crowns You reign victorious! High and lifted up Jesus, Son of God. The Darling of Heaven crucified Worthy is the Lamb.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Thank you for the Seals Lord Thanks you for Malachi 4 Restored us to Your Perfect will Back to the Word Revealed to us Your Name

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Thank You for the Cloud Lord Thank You For the SON OF MAN You Revealed again today In our flesh to redeem us back to God.
